positioning.headline: AI Agent / Harness Engineering
positioning.summary: Practical agent tooling focused on replayable workflows, inspectable artifacts, and operator-facing quality gates.

active_products.value: TypeScript and Rust runtime for embedding providers, skills, MCP, and fast local tools into existing systems.
Long-audio transcription and meeting-notes harness with chunking, structured outputs, and exportable artifacts.
local_quickstart: agent-meeting-notes run path/to/meeting.mp3 --out runs/meeting-001 --transcriber openai --summarizer openai

active_products.value: Human-reviewed content pipeline for Xiaohongshu and RedNote drafts, calendars, and publish packages.
Personal site and long-term public surface for demos, notes, and portfolio framing.

supporting_repositories.why: Early CLI experiments around chat APIs and terminal interaction patterns.
Linux kernel lab work and low-level systems exposure.

next_build_targets: compact agent harness lab with repeatable tasks and pass/fail checks
stronger trace and evaluation surfaces around tool use
more examples that show how CLI products fit into actual operator workflows
